fields.description:
## Context
Enforcement lives at the merge gate: a CI job verifies the required-environment certificate over the merged log and fails when a ticket that must carry one does not. This newly forbids landing an un-certified change in high-security projects. REUSE: the identity epic already shipped this gate as `.github/workflows/verify-identity.yaml`, which walks the merged log and grandfathers via `ENFORCE_SINCE`. Add an op-cert verification lane to that SAME gate (one merged-log walk + grandfathering) rather than standing up a parallel walker.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The op-cert required-environment check is added to / mirrors the shipped `verify-identity.yaml` gate (one merged-log walk + `ENFORCE_SINCE`-style grandfathering covers both kinds), not a separate parallel job.
- [ ] The gate verifies the required-environment certificate over the merged log and fails on a missing/foreign cert (fixture test).
- [ ] Every existing workflow trigger that should fire on the gate is classified INCLUDED/NO_FILTER (CI-trigger audit).
- [ ] The new prohibition (cannot land un-certified) enumerates and classifies existing merge call-sites.
